Name: Meltin MMI
Description: MELTIN MMI describes itself as "developing Cyborg Technology that connects bodies with machines." The company's products examine biosignals to produce highly accurate real time analyses of body movements. Their MELTANT-? cyborg is a robotic hand model which is used by a human user to create motions as similar as possible to our own hands while adding features such as enhanced flexibility, speed, strength, power, and accuracy. The cyborgs can be operated by a human user wearing the robotic devices, or remotely, even from overseas, thanks to the MELTIN MMI servers. While creating the MELTANT hand was the primary goal of the company, it has now set its sights on other modalities beyond movement, such as vision.
